sections.heading: Prognosis
sections.content: The source text provided is the NCCN Guidelines for Penile Cancer, not Uveal Melanoma. Therefore, no prognosis data for uveal melanoma is available from this source. The penile cancer guideline mentions a 5-year survival rate of approximately 65% for penile cancer, with 79% for localized disease, 57% for regional disease, and 10% for distant disease, but this is not applicable to uveal melanoma.
